title: mentha aquatica var. grandidentata
intro: Mentha aquatica var. grandidentata, commonly known as water mint or large-toothed water mint, is a variant of the water mint plant, characterized by its larger leaves with toothed margins. The medicinal properties of Mentha aquatica var. grandidentata include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to reduce stress and improve respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Mentha aquatica var. grandidentata include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to make topical creams and salves, or ingested as a dietary supplement.
